message:
feat: Durable Object full parity — body, headers, multi-fetch, zero-copy

- GoDO now passes full request (body, headers, query params) not just method+path
- Multi-fetch two-phase protocol works through DO path
- Zero-copy response bytes (Uint8Array) instead of string decode
- Response headers (cookies, custom headers, redirects) fully supported
- 12 new DO integration tests: routing, body/headers, cookies, status codes,
  redirects, SIMD, outbound fetch, state persistence
- 76 total tests, all passing
